item.title: Op amps as buffers / voltage followers
item.description: Circuit Op amps Op amp Pinout LM741 TL072TL082 TL074TL084LM324 References https://www.electronics-tutorials.ws/opamp/opamp_3.html https://circuitdigest.com/electronic-circuits/voltage-follower-circuit-using-op-amp https://www.quora.com/What-is-a-good-modern-substitute-for-the-venerable-741-op-amp-particularly-for-hobbyist-use-and-considering-things-like-price-availability-robustness-ease-of-use-etc
